title: anti-MOR  and anti-NeuN Immunocytochemistry
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"2l9jj","text":"Immunocytochemistry protocol for labeling mu opioid receptor (MOR) and neuronal nuclei (NeuN). Specifically used in rat and mouse tissue.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Wash slices 4x5 mins in 1xPBS on rotator at Room temperature
Wash slices 5x10 mins in0.3%Tween20/1x PBS on rotator at Room temperature

Incubate slices in secondary antibody solution 500 µL, per well , agitating overnight at 4 °C . Well plate should be covered with foil. Secondary antibody solution: - Cy5 Goat anti-Rb 1:500 for rat tissue Cy™5 AffiniPure® Goat Anti-Rabbit IgG (H L) Jackson ImmunoResearch Catalog #111-175-144 (RRID: AB_2338013) , FITC Goat anti-Rb 1:500 for mouse tissue Fluorescein (FITC) AffiniPure® Goat Anti-Rabbit IgG (H L) Jackson ImmunoResearch Catalog #111-095-003 (RRID: AB_2337972) - 0.3%Tween20/1x PBS
Wash slices 5x10 mins in0.3%Tween20/1x PBS on rotator at Room temperature

Incubate slices in primary antibody solution 500 µL, per well , rotating for 3 hours at Room temperature Primary antibody solution: - mouse anti-NeuN 1:1000 Anti-NeuN Antibody, clone A60 Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #MAB377 (RRID: AB_2298772) - 0.3% Tween20/1x PBS

Incubate slices in secondary antibody solution 500 µL, per well , agitating for 1 hour at Room temperature Secondary antibody solution: - Cy3 Goat anti-Ms 1:500 Cy™3 AffiniPure® Goat Anti-Mouse IgG (H L) Jackson ImmunoResearch Catalog #115-165-003 (RRID: AB_2338680) - 0.3%Tween20/1x PBS
Wash slices 4x10 mins in0.3%Tween20/1x PBS on rotator at Room temperature
Wash slices 4x10 mins in0.3%Tween20/1x PBS on rotator at Room temperature
Wash slices 1x10 min in 1x PBS on rotator at Room temperature
Mount tissue onto slide with Vectashield VECTASHIELD Antifade Mounting Medium Vector Laboratories Catalog #H-1000 and seal with nail polish.

Incubate slices in blocking solution 500 µL, per well , rotating for 2 hours at Room temperature Blocking Solution: - 0.2% BSA (0.2g/100mL) Bovine Serum Albumin MilliporeSigma Catalog #A3294 (CAS: 9048-46-8) - 5% NGS (50 microliters/mL) Normal Goat Serum Jackson ImmunoResearch Catalog #005-000-121 (RRID: AB_2336990) - 0.3% Tween20/1x PBS

Incubate slices in primary antibody solution 500 µL, per well . Agitate overnight at 4 °C Primary antibody solution: - Rb anti-MOR 1:10000 ImmunoStar Mu Opioid Receptor Antibody Immunostar Catalog #24216 (RRID: AB_572251) - 0.3% Tween20/1x PBS
creator: Aashka Popat
